classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机/零部件外形尺寸示意，包含键槽、轴径、长度、公差和基准 A 等机械尺寸标注，且有局部放大图与尺寸箭头，没有针脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸类。

classification.reason: 目标框内为电机端面机械结构视图，包含'动力航插'、'编码器航插'的外形安装位置指示，以及'Ø145±0.2'、'4-Ø9'、'45°'、'□130'等安装孔和法兰尺寸标注；未给出针脚编号与功能对应关系，因此最接近机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是全图左侧蓝框内的动力线表格，包含'引线号 Pin No'、'信号定义 Defintion'、'引线颜色 Colour'、'线径Wire Diameter'，并将B/I/F/G/C/E与U/V/W/PE、白WHITE、红RED、黑BLACK、黄绿YEL/GRN、16AWG对应，体现动力接口接线和针脚功能定义。

title.title_zh: 动力线引线号与信号定义
title.title_en: Power Lead Pin and Signal Definition

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框仅显示表头文字'连接器型号'和'Connector Models'，结合完整图可见其位于连接器型号表格区域，但该裁剪本身没有针脚编号与功能、线色或接线关系定义，最接近机械尺寸类中连接器型号/外形相关信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形多芯反馈连接器针位示意，标有A、B、C等针位字母及型号'CMS3102A20-18PE00A-A'；在完整标注图中该框位于'Feedback'连接器型号列，并与左侧反馈信号定义表对应，因此属于反馈连接器针脚相关内容。

title.title_zh: 反馈连接器型号与针位图
title.title_en: Feedback Connector Model and Pin Layout

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Clear single A label to the right of the top-right contact.
Clear B label immediately right of the middle-right contact.
Small C label at lower-right, adjacent to the bottom-right contact.
Clear D label below and right of the bottom-center contact.
Clear E label below and left of the lower-left contact.
Clear F label to the left of the middle-left contact.
G label near upper-left contact; glyph is close to contact outline but distinguishable.
H label is partially obscured/overlapped by nearby top-center geometry, so the tight box includes only visible glyph pixels.
The part-number text is not visible in the provided image crop; retained the supplied initial region because no matching glyphs can be visually localized.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve exact visible Chinese and alphanumeric text; provide professional Western mechanical engineering English translations
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume millimeters for unmarked mechanical dimensions when context is clearly mechanical engineering

terminology_rules.connector_terms: Use Encoder connector, Feedback connector, Pin layout, Mounting hole, Keyway orientation, Connector model
terminology_rules.position_labels: Preserve letter labels A through H for pin positions
terminology_rules.part_numbers: Preserve exact alphanumeric part numbers as shown

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'反馈线 Feedback'接线表，列出A至T等针脚与'SD+'、'SD-'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'+5V'、'GND'、'SHIELD'等反馈信号及蓝、黄、棕、白、红、黑等线色对应关系，并标注线径'28AWG'，属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为连接器正面外形图和型号标识'CMS3102A20-29PE009-A'，可见圆形插孔/安装孔结构，但没有针脚编号与功能、线色或接线对应关系；结合全图该区域位于反馈线连接器型号栏，最接近机械外形/连接器结构信息。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Single horizontal part-number label at the lower center; slight proximity to nearby symbols, but the glyph line is distinct.

drawing_metadata.target_image_role: Target structure drawing crop; authoritative for text and coordinates
drawing_metadata.context_image_role: Full context image used only for view meaning
drawing_metadata.assumed_unit: mm for mechanical dimensions when stated; no dimensional values visible in this crop

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not translate part numbers or connector model codes.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No explicit units visible in Image 1; do not infer dimensional units for the connector model text.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use professional mechanical terms such as Connector model, Motor connector, Encoder connector, Connector detail, and Cable interface when mapping source content.

ambiguous_terms.note_zh: 仅能确认其为连接器型号/规格标识，目标裁剪图中未标明电机或编码器用途。
ambiguous_terms.note_en: Confirmed as a connector model/specification marking only; the target crop does not itself label motor or encoder function.

dimension_records.engineering_notes: Front-face circular multi-pin connector with four mounting screws is shown; no dimensional values are present in this target crop.
dimension_records.ambiguity_notes: Function as motor or encoder connector is not labeled within Image 1.

mounting_interface.zh: 可见方形法兰和四个角部安装螺钉/孔位，但目标图中没有尺寸或孔径标注。
mounting_interface.en: A square flange with four corner mounting screws/holes is visible, but no size or hole callouts are present in the target crop.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 此区域为连接器细节视图，不包含轴、键或键槽信息。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: This region is a connector detail view and contains no shaft, key, or keyway information.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 未显示外形尺寸或安装间隙尺寸。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No overall envelope or clearance dimensions are shown.

connector_considerations.zh: 可识别连接器型号为 CMS3102A20-29PE009-A；具体针脚定义、线缆方向和配套件未在目标图中标注。
connector_considerations.en: Connector model CMS3102A20-29PE009-A is identifiable; pin assignment, cable exit direction, and mating part are not specified in the target crop.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少尺寸、公差、单位、连接器用途和安装接口参数。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Dimensions, tolerances, units, connector function, and mounting-interface parameters are missing or unresolved.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 目标裁剪图未显示尺寸、孔径、公差、单位或安装间距。
unresolved_items.issue_en: The target crop shows no dimensions, hole diameters, tolerances, units, or mounting spacing.
unresolved_items.impact: No direct dimensional inspection records can be extracted from Image 1.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 连接器用途未在目标裁剪图中直接标注。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Connector function is not directly labeled in the target crop.
unresolved_items.impact: Do not assert motor connector or encoder connector from Image 1 alone.

classification.reason: 目标框内为'未注线性公差'表，列出尺寸范围0.5~3、>3~6、>6~30、>30~120、>120～400及对应±0.2至±1.2的线性公差；在完整图纸中该表位于标题栏附近，属于机械图纸尺寸公差信息。

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Chart uses torque in N.m and speed in rpm where visible; mechanical length unit not specified in this crop

terminology_notes: This crop is a motor performance curve rather than a mechanical structure dimension view.
translation_notes: workspace is interpreted as operating region/work area in the performance curve context.

dimension_records.reason: Text is the chart title, not a mechanical dimension.
Vertical axis label and unit identify torque values on the curve.
These numeric labels are aligned with the torque axis tick marks.
Label names the upper operating region of the performance curve.
Label names the lower continuous operating region of the performance curve.
Coordinate callout is placed on the upper performance curve plateau/end point.
Coordinate callout is placed near the transition point of the continuous curve.
Coordinate callout corresponds to the upper right end of the short-term curve.
Coordinate callout corresponds to the lower right end of the continuous curve.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图右下角橙色标注区域内，内容为'编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters'表格，列出编码器类型和分辨率'131072(M16/S17bit)'，属于反馈/编码器相关信息；虽未显示针脚定义，但在给定类别中最接近反馈编码器类。
